inputs.text: Meri tabiyat kharab hai, bukhar hai, sar dard ho raha hai

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Low-grade fever and malaise are common in viral fever

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can also cause fever and malaise

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid is less likely at this stage without other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Mere bukhar roz badh raha hai, pet dard ho raha hai aur kabz hai

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Abdominal pain and constipation are common in gastroenteritis

hypotheses.label: Viral fever
hypotheses.rationale: Viral fever can also cause abdominal pain and constipation

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Typhoid is possible but not confirmed without other specific symptoms

inputs.text: Meri haalat bahut kharab hai, tez bukhar hai, kabz ke baad dast ho raha hai aur bahut kamzori hai
inputs.image_desc: pale appearance, dark circles under eyes

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Tez bukhar, kabz ke baad dast, and severe weakness are cardinal signs of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Gastroenteritis can cause diarrhea but not typically after constipation

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Malaria can cause fever but not typically with abdominal symptoms

inputs.text: Mere haalat aur bhi kharab ho gayi hai, continuous high fever hai, bahut thakan hai

hypotheses.label: Typhoid
hypotheses.rationale: Continuous high fever and exhaustion are typical of typhoid

hypotheses.label: Gastroenteritis
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of response to treatment and worsening symptoms

hypotheses.label: Malaria
hypotheses.rationale: Ruled out due to lack of specific symptoms and worsening condition
